Fields.Name: Handle Move Direction as Long Press

Fields.Description: Whether to treat the key to be entered as a long press

Fields.Description: Whether to treat the key to be entered as a long press

Fields.Description: Whether to treat the key to be entered as a long press

Fields.Name: AI Goal Waits For Duration End
Fields.Description: If this is ON, the AI goal will not be successful until the end of its life
